title: Nod3py's Customs
description: A variety of cosmetic changes for 1.21.1, including: Hidden Armor, 1.8.9 Sword Blocking (No Shield)
body:
# Nod3py's Customs
Hey there! I wanted to make a mod that encapsulated every cosmetic addition I wanted as servers like Hypixel started switching over to later versions of the game (1.21.1).

Recently, I created a mod that stops the rendering of not only armor, but also textured player skulls when worn.

As I developed that mod, I figured I would add more and more features to a seperate mod-- a mod I've wanted for ages but never got. A mod that could add cosmetic functionality for servers I play on, and maybe y'all could benefit too!

This is the result of that.

![1.8 Sword Blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f174e328cd50d994bf7ac1729e598b6329810e6.png)


## Features
### General
- Enabling/Disabling of Armor and Worn Skulls

![ArmorDisabling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06293147ddfed3c3a18da7a374a2ed0618531485_0.webp)
  - Incompatible with ShowMeYourSkin
- Reintroducing 1.8 Sword Blocking WITHOUT THE NEED FOR SHIELDS BEING EQUIPPED
  - Works with custom item models/textures

### Skyblock-Specific
- /pd or /i4 <player> to get an overlay color for the spirit leap menu in dungeons
- **Dungeon Map**

![Dungeon Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e67a0bc857200cbde9fff772f05f19a22ccc93aa.png)
  - Shows player heads of the players that are within render distance

- **Automatic PreDev Spirit Leap detection !!!**

![AutoPreDevLeap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674d94e0ed640fff70ea962cecd9a3b3e8f37355_0.webp)
  - Players will glow orange in the Spirit Leap menu when they can be safely leapt to

All of these features are strictly client-side and cosmetic, so have fun using them on servers!
